title: croton orinocensis
intro: Croton orinocensis, also known as the Orinoco croton, is a plant species native to the savannas and grasslands of South America. The leaves and stems of the Croton orinocensis plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves making a decoction by boiling the leaves and stems in water, or using it as a tincture or salve for topical application.
